title: Granular Premium Feature Access Management per Customer
story: As a DataTools Pro admin, I want to grant or remove individual premium features (Snowflake, HubSpot, Tableau) for specific customers independently of their billing plan, so that I can handle special plans and manual overrides.
description:
## Behavior
Admin interface allows assigning or removing individual premium features per customer, independent of the billing plan. This enables:
- Manual overrides for specific customers
- Special plans with custom feature combinations
- Internal/admin-granted access for evaluation

When a feature is granted, the customer sees the corresponding navigation item in the left sidebar.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can grant individual premium features per customer
Admin can remove individual premium features
Granted features appear in the customer's left navigation
Feature access is independent of billing plan
ux_changes: Customers with granted features see corresponding navigation items. Admin interface shows feature toggle per customer.
middleware_changes: Feature access checks updated to support individual feature grants alongside plan-based access.
data_model_changes: Individual feature-to-customer mapping records for granular access control.
implementation_notes: Extends the plan-based feature gating to support individual feature grants. Admin can grant Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau access per customer.
comment_summary: Developer implemented granular premium feature grants for Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau with admin interface. Granted features appear in customer's left navigation.
